title: 2 Kroneskilling - Christian IV (Type 1)

obverse.description: Small crown above RFP within beaded circle. Legend outside the circle. Date may be present above crown tips (Type I - Of course within the beaded circle as in the case of coin in pics)
obverse.lettering_translation:
Piety strengthens the realms
Christian IV (King of) Denmark by the Grace of God
obverse.picture_copyright: Fritz Rudolf Künker GmbH & Co. KG, Osnabrück und Lübke + Wiedemann KG, Leonberg

reverse.description: Value in letters on three lines above an oval with inside the fractional value of the coin (respect to the corona danica standard); all is within a beaded circle. Legend outside the circle, around rim, with mintmark at end (in Type II date is in the legend before the mintmark).
reverse.lettering_translation: King of Norway, the Wends and the Goths
reverse.picture_copyright: Fritz Rudolf Künker GmbH & Co. KG, Osnabrück und Lübke + Wiedemann KG, Leonberg

comments:
Type I :date above the crown on obverse. More common version
Type II :date in reverse legend. Legend is NOR VAN GOT REX and value is II/SKILI/ NG with the last line of value at sides of oval

Mintmarks:
(c) = Crossed swords
